translator_credits.name: Initial author review
translator_credits.note: Translations use standardized Latin (Boko) orthography with hooked letters ɓ, ɗ, ƙ. Ajami (Arabic script) variants tracked separately and can be added per ACP.

aaep:agent.session.started.summary_detailed: Ina farawa aikin da ka nema: {request_text}
aaep:agent.session.started.notes: 'Ina farawa' = 'I am beginning'. Present continuous, standard Hausa.

aaep:agent.session.completed.summary_detailed: Na gama aikin a cikin millisecond {duration_ms}. Na yi amfani da kayan aiki {tool_invocations_count}.

aaep:agent.session.errored.summary_normal: Aikin bai yi nasara ba saboda kuskure
aaep:agent.session.errored.summary_detailed: Aikin bai yi nasara ba saboda: {error_message}. Za a iya gyara: {recoverable}
aaep:agent.session.errored.notes: 'Kuskure' = mistake/error. 'Bai yi nasara ba' = literally 'did not succeed'.

aaep:agent.session.cancelled.notes: 'Dakatar' = stop/halt. Verb takes agent in fuller form.

aaep:agent.progress.updated.notes: Hausa expresses percentage as 'kashi X cikin ɗari' = 'part X out of hundred'.

aaep:agent.tool.invoked.summary_detailed: Ina amfani da kayan aiki {tool} tare da {args_summary}

aaep:agent.tool.completed.summary_detailed: Kayan aiki {tool} ya kammala da sakamako: {status}

aaep:agent.output.streaming.notes: Streaming events use empty summaries; chunk content is the speech.

aaep:agent.awaiting.confirmation.summary_detailed: Ina bukatar tabbatarwarka kafin in yi {action}. Sakamako: {consequence}
aaep:agent.awaiting.confirmation.notes: 'Ka yarda in yi X?' = 'do you agree that I do X?' — natural Hausa confirmation request. 'Tabbatarwa' = confirmation.

aaep:agent.awaiting.clarification.notes: 'Tambaya' = question. Direct pass-through for question text.

aaep:agent.handoff.requested.summary_normal: Zan mika aikin ga wani saboda {reason}
aaep:agent.handoff.requested.notes: 'Mika' = pass/hand over. Future tense 'Zan' marks intent.
